title: Midnight Magenta
description: A cool magenta sky overlay compatible with Optifine/Skyboxify!
body: ![LogoBanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fdb064f4a25ae5747dca78fcf8b595ba068bc53_0.webp) # Midnight Magenta ![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/midnight-magenta?style=for-the-badge) ![Modrinth Game Versions](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/midnight-magenta?style=for-the-badge) > In this sky overlay, vivid magenta nebulae stretch across the sky, blending into deep shadows and dark cosmic clouds. Countless stars shine through the vibrant haze, creating a striking and mysterious atmosphere that gives the world a powerful, otherworldly feel while playing. The pack uses the Optifine format, so it will require a compatibility mod to use. > Recommended: Turn off Sun & Moon [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/M4M61V7YTQ) ### Issue? Let me know on Discord!
